description_long: This object consists of two stacked hardcover books, with the top book featuring a reddish-brown wooden-textured cover and a wide, textured gray band running across its width. The bottom book has a blue cover with a slightly worn appearance and visible cream-colored pages. The books are thick, with the top book being slightly larger and more prominent. The gray band on the top book appears to be a decorative or functional strap, adding a unique visual element. Both books have visible page edges, and the spines show subtle binding details. The overall appearance suggests sturdy, well-used volumes that might be found in an urban park, on a bench, or left on a sidewalk.
description: Two thick, stacked hardcover books—one reddish-brown with a gray band, the other blue—showing visible page edges and sturdy covers.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cream-colored page edges of both books, with the gray band crossing the top book horizontally.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the reddish-brown cover and the full width of the gray band, with the blue book mostly hidden beneath.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the opposite page edges, with the gray band again visible and the blue book's cover peeking out.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the spines of both books, the gray band running vertically, and the thickness of the volumes.
attribute_spine_design: The spines are plain, with the top book showing two subtle vertical bands and the bottom book in solid blue. No text or decorative elements are visible.
